title: [release-1.26] Backport misc fixes from upstream.
body:
Backports fixes from `upstream` (`1.27.0-dev`) to `release-1.26`:
https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4013 squash, layers: never use build cache when computing last step of last stage
https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4086 add: fail on bad HTTP response instead of writing to container for URL sources
https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3998 run: allow re-using secret artifact from host in new RUN steps

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL backported fixes which comes without any complications.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.26/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan Is there anything else that we need to backport ? or should we cut `1.26.3` now.
I am waiting for your approval.  I am fine to go with what we have as long as the containers/common is updated.
I'm late to the review party, but LGTM and thanks @flouthoc !
